scenes.visual_note: Mira owl appears warmly, soft teal glow radiates outward
scenes.subtitle_text: Welcome. You're not doing this alone anymore.
scenes.voice_text: Welcome to GluMira. You've already taken the hardest step — showing up for someone you love. Let's walk through this together.

scenes.visual_note: An insulin activity curve draws itself gently across the screen
scenes.subtitle_text: Understanding insulin timing helps you support with confidence.
scenes.voice_text: GluMira shows you when insulin is most active — so you can feel prepared, not panicked, when supporting a dose decision.

scenes.visual_note: Multiple dose curves stack; overlap zones glow amber
scenes.subtitle_text: We watch for overlap so you don't have to worry.
scenes.voice_text: When doses overlap, GluMira highlights the risk so you can act early — or simply know that everything is safe.

scenes.visual_note: A clean two-page PDF report slides into view
scenes.subtitle_text: Share clear reports with the care team in one tap.
scenes.voice_text: Generate a clinician-ready report anytime. No spreadsheets, no guesswork — just clear data the care team can act on.

scenes.visual_note: Soft confetti and a teal completion badge appear
scenes.voice_text: That's everything you need to know for now. GluMira is here whenever you need it — day or night.
